scope.target: Define canonical source schema and directory structure
scope.dependency_radius: .ai canonical assets, workflow docs, future wrapper mappings
constraints: Do not migrate existing assets yet

inputs.architecture_target: Create an agent-neutral canonical schema for portable AI assets
user_constraints: Keep the approach highly portable and repo-centric
Avoid duplicating full content into every agent-specific folder

steps: Created .ai/assets as the canonical source root
Defined separate canonical areas for skills, commands, shared assets, and templates
Created skill-spec, command-spec, and prompt-package templates
Recorded schema decisions and directory structure in a Stage 2 workflow document
validation: Canonical directories are separated from wrapper directories
deferred_items: Map existing assets into canonical form

results.summary: Completed Stage 2 canonical schema and directory structure definition.

historical_note: This task records the Stage 2 schema at the time it was defined. Later stages retired the command-spec layer from active use and introduced canonical sub-agent-role prompts as a separate asset family.
